form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Ross The Boss at this track last start over 515m (29.47). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when third behind Ross The Boss at this track last start over 515m (29.47). Has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided soon after the start; Checked off the heels on the home turn.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at The Meadows over 525m (30.21) beating Launch Mode in Grade 5 on April 4. Was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at The Meadows over 525m (30.21) beating Launch Mode in Grade 5 on April 4. Was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Has a decent strike-rate off the draw and is in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Has a decent strike-rate off the draw and is in the mix.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Warragul over 460m (25.47) beating Lindenow Buster in Grade 4/5 on April 3. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at Warragul over 460m (25.47) beating Lindenow Buster in Grade 4/5 on April 3. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Fell in home straight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.11. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week ago. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.11. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week ago. Will be tested in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when sixth (29.84) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when sixth (29.84) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 1.3 lengths in 30.15, beating Keep Rolling. Last start finished 5th in a OPEN on March 29 over 512m at Mt Gambier behind Zipping Andora beaten 6 lengths (29.79). Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
